candidate_check.description: Unsigned add-ins in PowerPoint must be blocked with no Trust Bar Notification to the user.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft PowerPoint 2016 >> PowerPoint Options >> Security >> Trust Center "Disable Trust Bar Notification for unsigned application add-ins and block them" is set to "Enabled".

Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key:

HKCU\software\policies\Microsoft\office\16.0\powerpoint\security

If the value notbpromptunsignedaddin is REG_DWORD = 1, this is not a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft PowerPoint 2016 >> PowerPoint Options >> Security >> Trust Center "Disable Trust Bar Notification for unsigned application add-ins and block them" to "Enabled".
title: Unsigned add-ins in PowerPoint must be blocked with no Trust Bar Notification to the user.
